title: Quicksand
overview: A young woman finds herself struggling to maintain her mental health and grounded family life on a rural Dutch island when her capricious, city-dwelling thespian mother falls incurably ill and expects her increasingly regular company and assistance.

trailers.title: QUICKSAND Trailer | PÖFF 2021
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
